span.p:
Module artifact
worksheet, prompt output,
capstone, or pilot plan

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(124, 45, 18) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Remove named-company,
private, or invented evidence

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(124, 45, 18) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Add category, trigger,
committee, proof, exclusions

span.p:
Add sales action,
buyer enablement,
or next conversation use

span.p:
Add signal fields,
owner, SLA, cadence,
dashboard need

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(124, 45, 18) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Replace vanity metrics
with account movement,
committee, signal quality

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(124, 45, 18) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Add assumptions,
unknowns, source logic,
human correction
